label: agent loop • create three distinct files in one run
query: Create three files in this folder: 'one.txt' containing the single line ALPHA, 'two.txt' containing the single line BRAVO, and 'three.txt' containing the single line CHARLIE. Nothing else in each file.
notes: Multi-target creation in an empty workspace: pins that the model can author several files with distinct, specific contents in one run without an anchor file to read. Clean-path: no tool call may return an error envelope. Distinct from write-new-file (single file).
